title: Short Swords Vanilla
body:
![Texture pack view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d6e09f7a79b9dc686d688f44196803b4fc213a3_0.webp)This texture pack makes the swords shorter while maintaining the vanilla style.

- Wood sword
- Stone sword
- Copper sword
- Golden sword
- Iron sword
- Diamond sword
- Netherite sword
